title: Asset Build Pipeline
objective: 把内容真源到多端输出的核心构建管线做成可用闭环，使简历、演示文稿、笔记和项目都能从 content/ 稳定生成 Web 与静态资产

tasks.title: Make resume YAML validation explicit
acceptance_criteria: Resume build script validates required YAML sections before generation
Validation errors name the missing or malformed field
Resume pipeline documentation describes input schema and output path
tasks.notes: Keep resume data as the source of truth; do not hand-edit generated assets.

tasks.title: Generate resume web and PDF artifacts
acceptance_criteria: Resume page reads structured resume content rather than placeholder copy
PDF generation path is implemented or a documented local dependency blocker is captured
Generated resume artifacts are reproducible from npm scripts
tasks.notes: Typst is preferred for PDF output; if the binary is unavailable, preserve a clean fallback contract.

tasks.title: Define deck metadata and build manifest
acceptance_criteria: Each deck has parsed title, date, slug and source path
Deck manifest is deterministic and checked by the build script
Deck pipeline documentation explains Markdown frontmatter requirements
tasks.notes: Implemented deterministic manifest generation in scripts/build-decks.js. The script parses title/date/slug/sourcePath, validates duplicate slugs, writes public/assets/decks/manifest.json, and documents the frontmatter contract in docs/deck-pipeline.md. Slidev HTML/PDF export remains pending for later local build work.

tasks.title: Make deck outputs browsable
acceptance_criteria: Deck index lists generated deck metadata
Each listed deck has a stable local output target or documented placeholder
Deck build command can run without external write side effects
tasks.notes: Do not introduce a hosted slide service in this sprint.

tasks.title: Promote notes and projects to typed content collections
acceptance_criteria: Notes and projects have explicit frontmatter schemas
Notes index renders real note metadata from content/
Projects index renders real project metadata from content/
tasks.notes: Added src/content.config.ts with Astro content collections for content/notes and content/projects via astro/loaders glob. Notes and projects index pages now read getCollection metadata, sort by date, and render real frontmatter fields from content/.

tasks.title: Add asset build orchestration
acceptance_criteria: One npm command runs resume, deck and semantic asset builders in deterministic order
Build script reports skipped optional steps clearly
Generated asset paths match page expectations
tasks.notes: Keep the orchestration local-only and audit-friendly.

tasks.title: Add pipeline regression checks
acceptance_criteria: PRD validation remains part of the verification flow
Pipeline build checks fail on malformed content fixtures
npm run build passes or documents a concrete dependency blocker
tasks.notes: Test coverage should focus on schema and generated manifest contracts.
